_comment: BrainTrade LP Template — edit this file to reproduce a new version of the landing page. All copy and image paths live here. The index.html reads from these keys via JS or a simple find-replace workflow.

form.title: Start Your Trading Education With a Personal Trainer

items.title: Sign up and learn
items.description: Register today and gain immediate access to our highly-rated online investment academy.

items.title: One-on-one phone coaching
items.description: After you register, your dedicated coach will call you for a free session to explain why mastering online investing is essential.

items.title: Learn all about the markets
items.description: Start your online trading education journey and get insights on the financial markets and the tools you need to conquer them.

journey.sectionTitle: Your Guided Learning Journey in 60 Days

phases.label: Month 1
phases.title: Learn & Practice
phases.description: Build your foundation with structured educational guidance and ongoing feedback, supporting the development of practical skills. Learn within a guided framework that supports independent thinking and self-directed development.

phases.label: Month 2
phases.title: Grow with BrainTrade
phases.description: Develop your knowledge and trade independently with educational assistance available.

benefits.sectionTitle: Take your trading journey to the next level

items.title: AI-Powered Trading Tools
items.description: Enhance your decision-making while you learn

items.title: Live Campus
items.description: Webinars, market updates, and live events

items.title: Real-Time Market Signals
items.description: Apply your learning in realistic conditions

items.title: Exclusive Content
items.description: Access structured learning paths and advanced tutorials

items.title: Seamless Transition
items.description: Move confidently from learning mode to practice mode

personalCoaching.title: Personal Coaching
personalCoaching.subtitle: Get professional 1-on-1 training
personalCoaching.body: Our Academy Trainer program pairs you with a dedicated personal trading coach who knows your goals and stays with you every step of the way. Get real-time answers by phone, practical training on live market setups, and steady support to build sharp trading skills with confidence.

learn.title: Learn and Practice
learn.subtitle: Join our Live Campus
learn.body: All your courses, trainer sessions, and trading tools - accessible in one platform. Whether it's trading basics, digital asset fundamentals or an introduction to Technical Analysis, we got you covered. You just sit back and watch!
bulletPoints: Let us introduce you to the Financial Markets
Watch our exclusive videos on hot trading topics
Find out all about Digital Assets
Learn How to use Technical Analysis
Take advantage of our AI-Powered Trading Tools

switchMode.title: Switch To Trader Mode
switchMode.subtitle: Get ready to enter the world of trading
switchMode.body: Access educational resources, practice in a simulated environment, and trade independently when you choose!

faq.sectionSubtitle: We are glad to help! Here are some of the most common questions and queries about BrainTrade, to save you some time.

items.question: Do I need prior experience to start the courses?
items.answer: No prior experience is required to start the courses. BrainTrade values transparency above all else, and our goal is to guide you through the educational process step by step, starting from the fundamentals.

items.question: Why should I upgrade my package with BrainTrade?
How can I ask other questions about BrainTrade?
Is BrainTrade only about trading courses?
How is BrainTrade different from buying a random trading course?

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Enough talk from our side. Here are the opinions that matter the most - your own.

items.name: Jenny Wilson
items.quote: BrainTrade really opened my eyes to how many opportunities show up in the markets every day. I started as a complete beginner and picked things up quickly because the video courses are clear, practical, and easy to follow. If you're new to trading, I truly recommend it. It covers the fundamentals every beginner needs at the start of their journey.

items.name: Trevor Hawkins
items.quote: Friends of mine bought me access to BrainTrade as a gift for my birthday and this was one of the coolest presents I have ever received. I started with the most basic courses and it was really a no-brainer from there, as I upgraded my package in almost a week. BrainTrade provides all the necessary knowledge and tools to navigate the financial markets and get the upper hand.

footer.legalText: BrainTrade (www.thebraintrade.com) is operated by BT Nexus Limited. Please read the terms, privacy policy, and cookie policy before proceeding.
